customerprofiles.objecttype.CfnAbout: Specifies an Amazon Connect Customer Profiles Object Type Mapping.

customerprofiles.objecttype.AllowProfile.Description: Indicates whether a profile should be created when data is received if one doesn’t exist for an object of this type. The default is `FALSE`. If the AllowProfileCreation flag is set to `FALSE`, then the service tries to fetch a standard profile and associate this object with the profile. If it is set to `TRUE`, and if no match is found, then the service creates a new standard profile.

customerprofiles.objecttype.Description.Description: The description of the profile object type mapping.

customerprofiles.objecttype.DomainName.Description: The unique name of the domain.

customerprofiles.objecttype.EncryptionKe.Description: The customer-provided key to encrypt the profile object that will be created in this profile object type mapping. If not specified the system will use the encryption key of the domain.

customerprofiles.objecttype.ExpirationDa.Description: The number of days until the data of this type expires.

customerprofiles.objecttype.Fields.Description: A list of field definitions for the object type mapping.

customerprofiles.objecttype.Keys.Description: A list of keys that can be used to map data to the profile or search for the profile.

customerprofiles.objecttype.ObjectTypeNa.Description: The name of the profile object type.

customerprofiles.objecttype.Tags.Description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

customerprofiles.objecttype.TemplateId.Description: A unique identifier for the template mapping. This can be used instead of specifying the Keys and Fields properties directly.
